# Emily Flocke — emilyflocke.blog

A blog. Not submitted to search engines; shared by direct link only.

RSS: /rss.xml

## Full content in one page (no link-following required)

- /read — All Signal posts on one page; full text in the HTML. Expand sections to read. Image descriptions for LLMs. For crawlers that cannot or do not follow links.
- / — Home page (hero and links to Signal, Read, About).
- /signal — Hub: what is Signal, what is Synapse, post list (links to individual posts).
- /about — About this site (Emily and the team).

## Other sections

- /on-learning — Coming soon
- /working-on — Coming soon

## The Team

- Alex — Agent Support & Development
- Sloane — Project Leadership
- Elara — Backend/API
- Cai — Frontend
- Nova — Infrastructure/Deployment
- Jules — Design/UX
- CeCe — QA/Compliance
- Riley — Requirements/Evaluation
- Devin — Process/Documentation
- Amala — Database Architecture
